title: Accurate Spears
body:
# Accurate Spears (Fabric)
MasUno Spears is a Mod for FABRIC 1.21.10 that adds the new Spear from 1.21.11

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ecjauTEez6s" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Attributes
Spears have 1.5 extra block of reach, and a minimum 1 block reach, meaning entities too close wont get hit.
Spears also have a fixed cooldown (You can´t spam hit)

### Spears have two attacks:

- Jab Attack (Left Click)
- Charge Attack (Hold Right Click)
  - While holding it, you won´t be able to attack with right-click
  - Everything that gets in your crosshair will get hit
  - The damage dealt depends on the speed between you and your victim
      Examples: 
        _If your victim is moving towards you, damage = speed_
        _If you are moving towards your victim, damage = speed_
        _If you both are moving towards eachother, damage = speed x 2_

  - If you hold the spear for too long, it will stop dismounting, dealing knockback and finally the spear will stop being held.
  - Heavier tiers (like netherite) last less than weaker tiers (like gold or wood)
